title: Sour Crumbly Moroccan Flour Flatbread
description: A tangy, crumbly flatbread infused with Moroccan spices and a fermented sourdough starter, dairyfree and vegan delight for snacking or serving with dips.

ingredients.name: Moroccan spice blend
ingredients.notes: ras el hanout, cumin, paprika, coriander, cinnamon, pepper

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together bread flour, baking powder, salt, and Moroccan spice blend.
In a separate bowl, combine warm water, sourdough starter, and sugar until smooth.
Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until a shaggy dough forms.
Add neutral oil and knead the dough on a lightly floured surface for 5–7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover with a damp cloth, and let rise at room temperature for 2–2.5 hours, or until doubled in size.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 8 equal portions; shape each into a round flatbread about 1.5–2 cm thick.
Preheat a skillet or griddle over medium heat; lightly oil the surface.
Cook each flatbread for 3–4 minutes per side, or until golden brown and baked through, flipping only once.
Transfer finished flatbreads to a cooling rack; serve warm or at room temperature.
